PagesAdmin.title: Pages
PagesAdmin.description: Manage dynamic landing pages (home, farm, news, events, horses, contact).
PagesAdmin.pageNotConfigured: Add a cover image, English and Arabic content, and choose visibility to publish this page.
PagesAdmin.bannerTitle: {count, plural, one {# page needs configuration} other {# pages need configuration}}
PagesAdmin.bannerDescription: Open each card below to add both languages, cover image, and visibility.
PagesAdmin.dialogNewPageNotice: This slug has no saved configuration yet. Save the form to create it.
PagesAdmin.activeHint: When visible, the public page is served for this slug (if the backend marks it active).
PagesAdmin.inactiveHint: When hidden, visitors will not get this page from the public API.
PagesAdmin.translationsHint: Title and main text are required in English and Arabic before saving.
PagesAdmin.deleteDescription: This removes the page configuration (public endpoint will return 404).
PagesAdmin.editDescription: Update cover image, crop metadata, translations, and visibility.
PagesAdmin.coverCropHint: Stored metadata only (no server-side cropping). Leave empty to keep/clear based on backend rules.
PagesAdmin.invalidTranslations: Both EN and AR must include title and text.
PagesAdmin.invalidCropJson: Cover crop must be valid JSON.
PagesAdmin.coverTooLarge: Cover image must be 10 MB or smaller.
PagesAdmin.coverInvalidType: Cover image must be JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.

LandingPage.missingHint: This page is not configured or is inactive.

SettingsPage.title: Settings
SettingsPage.invalidInstagramUrl: Please enter a valid Instagram URL.
SettingsPage.invalidYoutubeUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube URL.
SettingsPage.invalidFacebookUrl: Please enter a valid Facebook URL.
SettingsPage.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
SettingsPage.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.

GalleryPage.title: Gallery
GalleryPage.description: Manage the site gallery. Maximum 20 images total.
GalleryPage.emptyHint: Upload the first images for the public gallery.
GalleryPage.limitsHint: Up to 20 images total · Up to 20 per upload · Max 10 MB each · JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF
GalleryPage.tooManyFiles: You can add at most 20 images per upload.
GalleryPage.overGlobalCap: Gallery limit reached. Max {max} images total.
GalleryPage.invalidFileType: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF are allowed.
GalleryPage.fileTooLarge: Each image must be 10 MB or smaller.
GalleryPage.fileRequired: Please choose at least one image.
GalleryPage.uploadDescription: Add one or more images. The gallery has a global maximum of {max} images.
GalleryPage.editDescription: Update Instagram link and sort order.
GalleryPage.deleteDescription: This will remove the image from the gallery.
GalleryPage.instagramHint: Optional. Must be an instagram.com link. Leave empty to clear.
GalleryPage.invalidInstagramLink: Please enter a valid Instagram URL (instagram.com).
GalleryPage.invalidSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
GalleryPage.sortOrderBaseHint: Optional. Applies to the first uploaded file; the server assigns base + i for each next file.

HomePage.title: Afifi dashboard
HomePage.subtitle: Manage your account, security, and organization from one place.
HomePage.welcomeCardDescription: You’re authenticated with the API. Open your profile or security settings anytime.
HomePage.cardProfileDescription: Update your name and email for this account.
HomePage.cardSecurityDescription: Change password or review active refresh sessions.
HomePage.cardStaffLocked: Staff-only tools. Ask an administrator for access.

StaffDashboard.title: Dashboard
StaffDashboard.subtitle: Staff overview: key metrics and recent activity.
StaffDashboard.emptyHint: Try refreshing or check your permissions.
StaffDashboard.recentHorsesDescription: Latest updates in the horses catalog.
StaffDashboard.upcomingEventsDescription: Next scheduled events based on your language.

LoginPage.title: Sign in
LoginPage.description: Use your account email and password.

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.description: Name and email are stored by the API.

PasswordPage.title: Change password
PasswordPage.description: After a successful change, all sessions are revoked and you must sign in again.

SessionsPage.title: Active sessions
SessionsPage.description: Refresh tokens issued for this account. Revoke any session you don’t recognize.

UsersPage.title: Users
UsersPage.createInvalid: Please fill the required fields correctly.
UsersPage.dialogActivateDescription: This will allow the user to sign in again.
UsersPage.dialogDeactivateDescription: This will prevent the user from signing in.
UsersPage.dialogPasswordDescription: Superadmin only: set a new password for this user.
UsersPage.passwordInvalid: Password must be at least 8 characters.

NewsPage.title: News
NewsPage.translationsBothRequired: Add both translations (EN and AR) with title, description, and tags.
NewsPage.imageMaxSize: Image must be 5 MB or less.
NewsPage.imageBadType: Image type must be JPG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF.
NewsPage.imageOptionalHint: Optional: leave empty to keep the current image.
NewsPage.dialogCreateDescription: Enter the news details and select an image.

NewsletterPage.title: Newsletter subscribers
NewsletterPage.description: Emails captured from the public subscribe form. Export the full list as CSV anytime.
NewsletterPage.emptyHint: Try another page or export if you expect data.

NewsDetailsPage.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The article will be removed from the news list.
NewsDetailsPage.dialogEditDescription: Update the fields and save changes.
NewsDetailsPage.imageOptionalHint: Optional: leave empty to keep the current image.
NewsDetailsPage.removeImageDescription: This will delete the image file but keep the news item.

HorsesPage.title: Horses
HorsesPage.emptyHint: Try another page or add a new horse.
HorsesPage.dialogCreateDescription: Enter base details only. Add English and Arabic content on the horse page after creating.
HorsesPage.createInvalid: Please enter a slug and choose a category.
HorsesPage.createSuccessNavigate: Horse created. Continue editing on the detail page.

HorseDetailsPage.notFoundHint: It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
HorseDetailsPage.dialogEditDescription: Update the fields and save changes.
HorseDetailsPage.dialogEditCoverDescription: Upload a new cover image for this horse.
HorseDetailsPage.dialogEditProfileDescription: Slug, category, dates, owner, and visibility.
HorseDetailsPage.dialogEditTranslationDescription: Localized text and metadata. Required fields must be filled for this language before you save.
HorseDetailsPage.invalid: Please fill required fields and both translations (EN + AR).
HorseDetailsPage.invalidProfile: Check slug, category, height (if set), and other profile fields.
HorseDetailsPage.invalidTranslation: Complete name, short bio, description, and at least one tag for this language.

HorsesMedia.title: Gallery
HorsesMedia.description: Manage horse photos. Click any image to view full size.
HorsesMedia.emptyHint: Upload the first image to build the gallery.
HorsesMedia.fileRequired: Please choose at least one image.
HorsesMedia.dropHint: Drag and drop here, or click to select
HorsesMedia.maxFilesHint: 1–10 images · JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF · max 10 MB each
HorsesMedia.tooManyFiles: You can add at most 10 images per upload.
HorsesMedia.invalidFileType: Only JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF are allowed.
HorsesMedia.fileTooLarge: Each image must be 10 MB or smaller.
HorsesMedia.sortOrderHint: Applies to the first new image; the rest get consecutive sort orders (+1 each) on the server.
HorsesMedia.uploadDescription: Add one or more images. Optional caption and sort order apply to every new item; the server uses your sort order for the first file, then increments for each following file.
HorsesMedia.replaceDescription: Select a new file to replace the current image.
HorsesMedia.deleteDescription: This will remove the image from the gallery.
HorsesMedia.caption: Caption

HorsesAwards.title: Awards
HorsesAwards.emptyHint: Add the first award for this horse.
HorsesAwards.invalid: Please fill the required award fields.

EventsPage.title: Events
EventsPage.emptyHint: Try another page or add a new event.
EventsPage.dialogCreateDescription: Enter event schedule and provide both EN + AR translations.
EventsPage.createInvalid: Please fill required fields and both translations (EN + AR).
EventsPage.endsBeforeStarts: End time must be after start time.

EventDetailsPage.notFoundHint: It may have been deleted or you may not have access.
EventDetailsPage.imageOptionalHint: Optional: leave empty to keep the current image.
EventDetailsPage.removeImageDescription: This will delete the image file but keep the event.
EventDetailsPage.dialogEditDescription: Update the fields and save changes.
EventDetailsPage.invalid: Please fill required fields and both translations (EN + AR).
EventDetailsPage.endsBeforeStarts: End time must be after start time.
